task_objective: Prepare package for PyPI deployment with automated GitHub Actions workflow
design_decisions: Migrated to hatchling build backend with hatch-vcs for dynamic versioning based on git tags.
Added comprehensive PyPI metadata including classifiers, keywords, and project URLs.
Updated README.md to use absolute GitHub URLs for images to ensure rendering on PyPI.
Implemented GitHub Actions workflow for automated publishing on release using Trusted Publishing (OIDC).
Configured build targets to explicitly include assets and templates in the wheel and sdist.
results: Project is ready for PyPI. Verified local build contains all assets and templates. CI/CD workflow is ready.
